title: Plan and implement sports turf renovation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement sports turf renovation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare the turf renovation program

pcs.text: Assess existing turf site plans and documentation to establish purpose of turf surface to be renovated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess existing turf site plans and documentation to establish purpose of turf surface to be renovated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess existing turf site plans and documentation to establish purpose of turf surface to be renovated.

pcs.text: Determine the size of sports turf surface in need of renovation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the size of sports turf surface in need of renovation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the size of sports turf surface in need of renovation.

pcs.text: Conduct field tests to establish renovation site conditions according to workplace and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field tests to establish renovation site conditions according to workplace and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field tests to establish renovation site conditions according to workplace and industry standards.

pcs.text: Assess size of area and test results against purpose, and identify scope of renovations required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess size of area and test results against purpose, and identify scope of renovations required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess size of area and test results against purpose, and identify scope of renovations required.

pcs.text: Identify and select materials and resources required for the identified renovation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select materials and resources required for the identified renovation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select materials and resources required for the identified renovation requirements.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and identify controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and identify controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and identify controls.

pcs.text: Develop a renovation program containing site assessment report, results of field measurements and tests, risk controls, and material and resource requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a renovation program containing site assessment report, results of field measurements and tests, risk controls, and material and resource requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a renovation program containing site assessment report, results of field measurements and tests, risk controls, and material and resource requirements.

pcs.text: Develop and document a schedule of works and specifications for renovation program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a schedule of works and specifications for renovation program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a schedule of works and specifications for renovation program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare the turf renovation program

elements.title: Prepare renovation equipment

pcs.text: Review machinery maintenance logs to verify operational status for renovation activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review machinery maintenance logs to verify operational status for renovation activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review machinery maintenance logs to verify operational status for renovation activities.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational and safety checks of tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational and safety checks of tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational and safety checks of tools, equipment and machinery.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare renovation equipment

elements.title: Implement the renovation program

pcs.text: Select work team and contractors, and coordinate work in a sequential, timely and effective manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select work team and contractors, and coordinate work in a sequential, timely and effective manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select work team and contractors, and coordinate work in a sequential, timely and effective manner.

pcs.text: Organise and direct work according to the renovation schedule of works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise and direct work according to the renovation schedule of works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise and direct work according to the renovation schedule of works.

pcs.text: Monitor renovation tasks against performance targets, and undertake remedial action where non-compliant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor renovation tasks against performance targets, and undertake remedial action where non-compliant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor renovation tasks against performance targets, and undertake remedial action where non-compliant.

pcs.text: Monitor renovation work activities to maintain a clean and safe work environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor renovation work activities to maintain a clean and safe work environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor renovation work activities to maintain a clean and safe work environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement the renovation program

elements.title: Complete renovation activities

pcs.text: Reconcile completed works against renovation plan objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconcile completed works against renovation plan objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconcile completed works against renovation plan objectives.

pcs.text: Inspect equipment and machinery for operational status, and implement repairs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect equipment and machinery for operational status, and implement repairs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect equipment and machinery for operational status, and implement repairs.

pcs.text: Record expenses and review against budget according to workplace financial procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record expenses and review against budget according to workplace financial procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record expenses and review against budget according to workplace financial procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report turf renovation outcomes against planned objectives according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report turf renovation outcomes against planned objectives according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report turf renovation outcomes against planned objectives according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete renovation activities
